This '''unnamed scout trooper''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] who served and died during the [[Evacuation of Yavin]]. During the battle, he was able to infiltrate the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[temple]] base and obtain a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] containing secret information about the Alliance. [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Col Serra]] discovered this and ordered his fighting unit, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], to kill the scout [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] and bring the datapad back to the base. The [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] succeeded in their mission and killed the trooper, and brought the datapad back to the temple.<ref name="RS" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''
